results.title: ‘Most heroes don’t listen to female directors’: Huma Qureshi defends Toxic, backs Yash
results.description: Actor Huma Qureshi opened up about Yash-starrer Toxic, celebrating the cast's collaboration with acclaimed filmmaker Geetu Mohandas.

results.title: Venezuela earthquakes death toll rises to 3,342; over 16,000 injured
results.description: Caracas: The death toll from Venezuela’s twin earthquakes has risen to 3,342, with 16,740 people injured, National Assembly President Jorge Rodriguez said. Rodriguez said in an update on Telegram Sunday that the number of people rescued remains at 6,462. An official report said 17,345 people were also displaced, reports Xinhua news agency. Since the magnitude [...]

results.title: India news LIVE updates, 6 July 2026: Landslides disrupt Mumbai-Pune rail route, 16 trains cancelled, 7 deaths in Mumbai
results.description: India News Today's LIVE Updates, 6 July 2026: Get the latest breaking news on landslides disrupting the Mumbai-Pune rail route with 16 trains cancelled and the expressway section damaged, seven rain-related deaths in Mumbai including six in a chawl collapse, Neymar's retirement from international football after Brazil's shock World Cup exit to Norway, and PM Modi's three-nation visit to Indonesia, Australia and New Zealand beginning today, along with top headlines, politics, business, sports, entertainment and city updates from India and around the world.

results.title: Amarnath Yatra 2026: Devotees praise arrangements, security forces amid ongoing pilgrimage
results.description: Pahalgam, July 6 (SocialNews.XYZ) The Shri Amarnath Yatra continued smoothly on Monday as the fifth batch of pilgrims departed from Jammu for Srinagar amid rain and tight security arrangements, while devotees also began their onward... The post Amarnath Yatra 2026: Devotees praise arrangements, security forces amid ongoing pilgrimage appeared first on Social News XYZ .

results.title: Trump won big spending promises from NATO last year. This week in Turkey, he'll try to enforce them
results.description: President Trump heads to Turkey to press NATO allies on defense spending pledges. He expects immediate action on the 5% GDP target, a key focus after last year's summit. Despite ongoing disputes, Trump seeks to solidify his influence on the alliance's future, while also planning meetings on Ukraine and Syria. This summit serves as a crucial test of commitment to increased defense contributions.
